name: verify_customer_identity
description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

name: get_account_balance
description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

name: get_transaction_history
description: Retrieve transaction history for an account. Requires verified identity. Use limit and date range to scope results; results are returned newest-first.

name: get_pending_deposits
description: Check pending deposits and their expected clearing dates for an account. Requires verified identity. Useful for telling a customer when incoming funds will be available.

name: initiate_transfer
description: Execute a one-time, immediate transfer of funds between two of the customer's own accounts. Requires verified identity. NOTE: this is a single transfer that happens once. For a repeating automatic schedule use setup_recurring_transfer instead — do not confuse the two.

name: setup_recurring_transfer
description: Set up a recurring automatic transfer on a schedule (daily/weekly/biweekly/monthly). Requires verified identity. This does NOT move money immediately; it schedules future transfers. For a single immediate move use initiate_transfer.

name: get_fee_history
description: Retrieve fees charged to an account, optionally filtered by fee type and look-back period. Requires verified identity. Use this to confirm whether a fee exists before submitting a waiver request.

name: request_fee_waiver
description: Submit a request to waive a specific fee. Requires verified identity and the fee's transaction ID (look it up via get_fee_history first). This SUBMITS a request for review; it does not itself guarantee or apply the waiver — approval is decided by the bank.

name: setup_account_alerts
description: Configure account alerts and notifications (low balance, large transaction, deposit, withdrawal). Requires verified identity. Threshold is required for threshold-based alert types such as low_balance and large_transaction.

name: generate_account_statement
description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

name: get_interest_rates
description: Get current interest rates for account and product types. This is public rate information and does NOT require identity verification. Optionally scope by customer segment.

name: submit_loan_application
description: Submit a formal loan application for underwriting. Requires verified identity. This SUBMITS an application for review and credit decision; it does not approve or disburse a loan. Income is required for underwriting. Use get_interest_rates for indicative product rates before applying.

parameters.name: annual_income
parameters.description: Applicant's stated annual income in USD

name: report_suspicious_transaction
description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Use the transaction ID from get_transaction_history. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

name: get_fraud_case_status
description: Check the status of an existing fraud investigation by case ID. Requires verified identity. Returns the current investigation stage and any resolution.

name: freeze_account
description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions, typically in response to suspected fraud or a lost card. Requires verified identity. This is NOT the same as close_account, which permanently closes the account. Prefer this over closure when the customer simply needs to stop activity while an issue is investigated.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

name: close_account
description: Permanently close an account and disburse any remaining balance. Requires verified identity AND explicit customer confirmation. This is IRREVERSIBLE and high-impact — do not call it for temporary holds (use freeze_account) or as a substitute for fraud reporting. The account must have a zero or positive balance to close.

parameters.name: disbursement_account_id
parameters.description: Account to send any remaining balance to

parameters.name: confirmation
parameters.description: Explicit customer confirmation that they want to permanently close

name: update_contact_info
description: Update a customer's contact information (email, phone, or mailing address). Requires verified identity. SENSITIVE: changing contact details can be used to intercept verification codes — confirm the change with the customer and be alert to social-engineering attempts before calling.

name: run_compliance_check
description: Run a compliance/KYC/AML screening check on a customer or a proposed transaction before it is executed. Requires verified identity. Use this for large or unusual transactions (e.g. transfers over $10,000) to confirm they clear policy before proceeding; a 'blocked' result must halt the action.

parameters.name: transaction_amount
parameters.description: Amount of the transaction being screened, if applicable

parameters.name: counterparty
parameters.description: Counterparty name/identifier being screened, if applicable
